_usage: 製造業関連を厚めに取得するためのアドオン。query_default.json の query.bool.must 配列に、下記 'addon' の中身(boolブロック)を1要素として追加して使う。

query_string.query: robotics OR "machine vision" OR "predictive maintenance" OR "surrogate model" OR "simulation" OR "CAE" OR "digital twin" OR "edge AI" OR "materials informatics" OR "thermal management" OR "power electronics" OR "in-cabin sensing" OR "driver monitoring" OR "industrial automation" OR "additive manufacturing" OR "quality inspection"

robotics OR "machine vision" OR "predictive maintenance" OR simulation OR "digital twin" OR "edge AI" OR "materials informatics" OR "thermal management" OR "power electronics" OR "driver monitoring" OR "industrial automation" OR "quality inspection"

_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.AI・データ(シミュレーション/CAE): surrogate model, physics-informed, simulation acceleration, CAE, generative design, topology optimization
_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.センシング: in-cabin sensing, driver monitoring, DMS, occupant monitoring, radar sensing, vital sign monitoring, event-based vision
_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.検査・品質: visual inspection, defect detection, quality inspection, anomaly detection, machine vision
_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.予知保全: predictive maintenance, condition monitoring, vibration analysis, machine health
_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.ロボティクス・FA: industrial robotics, robot foundation model, bin picking, gripper, AMR, warehouse automation
_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.エッジAI: edge AI, AI accelerator, inference chip, neural processing unit, TinyML
_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.材料・MI: materials informatics, materials discovery, computational chemistry, battery materials
_mfg_tech_categories_keywords.熱・パワエレ: thermal management, thermal interface material, power semiconductor, GaN, SiC, wide bandgap
